nodes.name: Gerygone
nodes.summary: Gerygone（Gerygone）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Yellow-bellied gerygone、Brown gerygone、Green-backed gerygone等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-backed gerygone
nodes.summary: Green-backed gerygone（Gerygone chloronota）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Green-backed gerygone。

nodes.name: Green-backed gerygone
nodes.summary: The green-backed gerygone (Gerygone chloronota) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae found in northern Australia and New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The green-backed gerygone (Gerygone chloronota) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae found in northern Australia and New Guinea.…
